_comment: A realistic WhatsApp Business Cloud API inbound payload, as the n8n WhatsApp Trigger emits it (Meta's entry[0].changes[0].value object). Paste this into the WhatsApp Trigger's 'set mock data' to run the whole pipeline without a Meta account. All identifiers are fake.

text.body: Hey can you get the new roofing ad campaign live by Friday? Budget is $2k, target homeowners in Dallas.
